info.name: HRMS Audit Additions Masters CRUD
info.description: CRUD, activation, dropdown, and filter tests for /api/masters/audit-additions/. Set base_url, access_token or run login, company_id, employee_id, department_id, and designation_id before running company or relation scoped requests.
